name: Chuck Adult Cat Liver 400g
description: Product Description and Benefits This wet cat food contains approximately 40% liver along with other meat and animal derivatives, fish oil, vegetable oils, vitamins, and minerals. It provides essential nutrients like iron, taurine, and omega-6 fatty acids that contribute to a healthy immune system, strong muscles, and overall well-being for adult cats. The recipe is protein-rich, flavorful, and nutritionally balanced to keep your feline healthy and energized. Ingredients and Nutrition Meat & Animal Derivatives (including 40% liver) Fish Oil Vegetable Oils Vitamins and Minerals The inclusion of taurine, an essential amino acid for cats, supports heart and eye health, while omega-6 fatty acids help maintain healthy skin and a shiny coat.
